column3: Leader: I will bless the LORD at all times; Congregation: His praise will always be on my lips. Leader: My soul boasts in the LORD ; Congregation: Let the humble hear and rejoice. Leader: Magnify the LORD with me; Congregation: Let us exalt His name together. —Psalm 34:1–3
column4: Leader: Pupurihin ko ang PANGINOON sa lahat ng panahon; Congregation: ang pagpuri sa Kanya ay sasaaking bibig nang patuloy. Leader: Nagmamapuri sa PANGINOON ang aking kaluluwa, Congregation: marinig nawa ng mapagpakumbaba at magsaya. Leader: O dakilain ninyo na kasama ko ang PANGINOON, Congregation: at magkasama nating itaas ang Kanyang pangalan!

column3: Leader: Come, let us sing for joy to the LORD; let us shout to the Rock of our salvation! Congregation: Let us enter His presence with thanksgiving; let us make a joyful noise to Him in song. Leader: For the LORD is a great God, Congregation: A great King above all gods. —Psalm 95:1–3
column4: Leader: O halikayo, tayo’y umawit sa PANGINOON; tayo’y sumigaw na may kagalakan sa Malaking Bato ng ating kaligtasan! Congregation: Lumapit tayo sa Kanyang harapan na may pagpapasalamat; tayo’y magingay na may kagalakan sa Kaniya na may mga pagaawitan. Leader: Sapagkat ang Panginoon ay dakilang Diyos, Congregation: At dakilang Hari sa lahat ng mga diyos.

column3: Leader: The LORD reigns; let the nations tremble! Congregation: He is enthroned above the cherubim; let the earth quake! Leader: Great is the LORD in Zion; Congregation: He is exalted above all the peoples. Leader: Let them praise Your great and awesome name— Congregation: He is holy! —Psalm 99:1–3
column4: Leader: Ang PANGINOON ay naghahari, manginig ang taong-bayan! Congregation: Siya'y nakaupo sa mga kerubin; mayanig ang lupa. Leader: Ang Panginoon ay dakila sa Zion; Congregation: Siya'y higit na mataas sa lahat ng mga bayan. Leader: Purihin nila ang Iyong dakila at kakilakilabot na pangalan! Congregation: Siya'y banal!

column3: Leader: Day and night they never stop saying: Congregation: “Holy, Holy, Holy, is the Lord God Almighty, who was and is and is to come!” Leader: “Worthy are You, our Lord and God, to receive glory and honor and power, Congregation: for You created all things; by Your will they exist and were created.” —Revelation 4:8, 11
column4: Leader: at sila'y walang humpay na nagsasabi araw at gabi, Congregation: “Banal, banal, banal, ang Panginoong Diyos, ang Makapangyarihan sa lahat, ang noon at ang ngayon at ang darating!” Leader: “Karapat-dapat ka, O Panginoon at Diyos namin, na tumanggap ng kaluwalhatian at karangalan at kapangyarihan, Congregation: sapagkat nilikha mo ang lahat ng mga bagay at dahil sa iyong kalooban ay nabuhay sila at nalikha.”

column3: Leader: Ascribe to the Lord, O heavenly beings, Congregation: Ascribe to the Lord glory and strength. Leader: Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name; Congregation: worship the Lord in the splendor of holiness - Psalm 29:1-2
column4: Leader: Mag-ukol kayo sa Panginoon, O mga anak ng makapangyarihan, Congregation: Mag-ukol kayo sa Panginoon ng kaluwalhatian at kalakasan. Leader: Iukol ninyo sa Panginoon ang kaluwalhatian na nararapat sa kanyang pangalan; Congregation: sambahin ninyo ang Panginoon sa banal na kagayakan.

column3: Leader: Rejoice in the LORD, O you righteous, Congregation: And give thanks to his holy name! - Psalm 97:12
column4: Leader: Magalak kayo sa Panginoon, kayong mga matuwid; Congregation: At magpasalamat sa kanyang banal na pangalan.
